title: Element Registry
description: Data-driven element definitions. New elements are added here as data; the engine never branches on element name. Behavior is resolved by looking up an element's fields.

version.description: Config version; bump on every change for audit + hot-reload.

rarityTiers.description: Ordered rarity tiers. Open registry — add tiers without engine changes.

id.description: Stable machine id. Never reused; referenced everywhere by id, never by name.

category.description: Broad role; drives default technique templates, not hardcoded logic.

interactions.description: Data-driven element interaction matrix. Key = other element id, value = multiplier/relationship. Absent = neutral. This replaces any hardcoded rock-paper-scissors.

combinable.description: May participate in dual/triple/domain technique recipes.
